title: Keonjhar CDM&PHO Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 57 Pharmacist, Staff Nurse and More Posts
organization: Chief District Medical & Public Health Officer, Keonjhar
post_name: Pharmacist, Staff Nurse and More Posts
short_info: Chief District Medical & Public Health Officer, Keonjhar has released the official Pharmacist, Staff Nurse and More Posts Notification 2026 on 18 May 2026 at the official website of Keonjhar district. A total of 57 vacancies have been announced under the Keonjhar CDM&PHO Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates meeting the prescribed eligibility criteria mentioned in the official notification can apply offline up to 01 June 2026. The official notification PDF and application form link are available below.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for detailed age limit and relaxation details.

qualification.details: Please refer to the official notification for detailed eligibility criteria for each post.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for detailed salary information for each post.

selection_process: Selection based on highest length of incumbency under the Society as per reservation category if any
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://kendujhar.odisha.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
